title: Review PromptKit content and integrate into Open Brain knowledge base
job:
Review the contents of https://promptkit.natebjones.com/20260310_usk_promptkit_1 and add it to Open Brain:

1. Navigate to https://promptkit.natebjones.com/20260310_usk_promptkit_1 using browser automation
2. Capture and analyze all content on the page:
   - Document the full content structure and organization
   - Extract all text, prompts, templates, or frameworks
   - Screenshot key sections for reference
   - Identify the content type, purpose, and key insights

3. Add the content to Open Brain knowledge base:
   - Format the content appropriately for knowledge base ingestion
   - Create proper categorization and tags for searchability
   - Include source attribution (URL, date accessed, author if available)
   - Ensure content is structured for easy retrieval

4. Create a summary document describing:
   - What type of content this is and its primary value
   - Key frameworks, prompts, or insights that could be useful
   - How it relates to Full Refit's work or AI/automation practices
   - Recommended applications or integration approaches

5. Save all materials to `knowledge/prompt-kit-review/` with clear organization and a README explaining what was captured and added to Open Brain.
